channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Malcolm Rosas impresses in Sydney Swans performance against Melbourne
item.description: Malcolm Rosas delivered a standout performance for the Sydney Swans in their recent AFL match against the Melbourne Demons. The game, which drew attention for both on-field skill and crowd excitement,...

item.title: Lagos government steps up enforcement against hidden vehicle plates
item.description: Lagos State Government don intensify efforts to make roads for Lekki corridor safer and enforce traffic rules well well. Government officials meet with community leaders, residents, and lawmakers to d...

item.title: Dry needling gains popularity in physiotherapy, but evidence on pain relief remains mixed
item.description: Dry needling, a technique involving the insertion of very fine needles into muscle trigger points, has become increasingly common in physiotherapy over the past decade. Although it resembles acupunctu...

item.title: Palestinian trade unions urge international workers to intensify BDS and push for sanctions against Israel
item.description: Palestinian trade unions have issued a call to workers and unions worldwide to escalate actions against Israel through the Boycott, Divestment, and Sanctions (BDS) movement. On May Day, they urged wor...

item.title: Two adults die in suspicious house explosion in Bristol
item.description: Two adults have tragically lost their lives following an explosion at a residential property on Sterncourt Road in Bristol early this morning. Avon and Somerset Police reported that the blast occurred...

item.title: Chandrima Bhattacharya: From Legal Practice to Senior Trinamool Leadership in West Bengal
item.description: Chandrima Bhattacharya is a prominent leader of the Trinamool Congress and a key member of the West Bengal state cabinet under Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee. Currently serving as the MLA from Dum Dum...

item.title: Three Health Workers Killed in Kwara Road Crash During Workers’ Day Return
item.description: Naija News reports say three health workers from the Medical and Health Workers’ Union, Ekiti Local Government branch, Kwara State, don lose their lives for road accident wey happen along Oke-Onigbin–...

item.title: Gaucho Appointed to Mama Lucy Hospital Board, Says He Won't Attend Protests
item.description: Calvince Okoth, popularly known as Gaucho, has explained why he will no longer participate in protests, popularly known in Kenya as maandamano. He was recently appointed as a member of the Mama Lucy K...

item.title: Rivers Governor Fubara Urges Support for Tinubu’s Second Term, Highlights Southern Unity
item.description: Rivers State Governor, Sir Siminalayi Fubara, don call on Nigerians make dem support President Bola Ahmed Tinubu for second term so that e go fit continue with him ambitious plan for sustainable devel...

item.title: ADC Sets Date for 2026 Primaries, N100m Price for Presidential Forms
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) has officially announced its timetable for the 2026 primary elections. The party will hold its presidential primary on May 25, 2026, and has set the price for pre...

item.title: Man United v Liverpool: Alisson Injury Update and Team News Ahead of Premier League Clash
item.description: Manchester United and Liverpool, two of England’s most successful football clubs, face off at Old Trafford in a crucial Premier League encounter. The match is significant as both teams are competing f...

item.title: Colorado Governor Questions Impact of Postponing Negotiations with Trump Until Midterms
item.description: Colorado Governor has expressed doubt that waiting until the U.S. midterm elections to engage in negotiations with former President Trump will significantly affect outcomes. The governor highlighted t...

item.title: Senator Imee Marcos pushes for government-to-government oil deals to address fuel crisis
item.description: Senator Imee Marcos has urged the Philippine government to actively pursue direct government-to-government (G2G) oil procurement as a way to mitigate the effects of the ongoing oil crisis caused by te...

item.title: Malacañang Confirms Vice President Sara Duterte's Rescheduled 14-Day Overseas Trip
item.description: Malacañang Palace has officially confirmed that Vice President Sara Duterte will undertake a 14-day overseas trip that was rescheduled. The announcement comes from the Office of the President, providi...

item.title: Addressing Corruption and Leadership Failures in SAPS
item.description: South Africans have long suspected that parts of the South African Police Service (SAPS) have been compromised by criminal networks, and recent arrests of senior officers, including Ekurhuleni metro p...

item.title: One in Three HR Leaders Report Resistance to Inclusion Programmes, Impacting People with Convictions
item.description: A recent YouGov survey conducted for the national employment charity Working Chance has revealed that over one-third of HR decision-makers in the UK have experienced resistance to equity, diversity an...

item.title: Advocacy Groups Warn of Unfair Advantage for Alberta Government in Fall Referendum Campaign
item.description: As Alberta's fall referendum approaches, advocacy groups are raising concerns about the provincial government's unrestricted ability to spend taxpayer dollars on advertising. This is particularly worr...

item.title: Australia may explore leasing Japanese submarines amid AUKUS challenges
item.description: Australia’s pursuit of nuclear-powered submarines through the AUKUS agreement carries significant risks, prompting calls from former defence officials to explore a temporary solution involving Japanes...

item.title: SAWS Issues Yellow and Orange Level Warnings for Severe Thunderstorms Across Northern Cape, North West and Free State
item.description: The South African Weather Service (SAWS) has issued important severe thunderstorm warnings for several provinces in South Africa. A Yellow Level 2 warning is in place for the northern half of the Nort...

item.title: PM Shehbaz and Nawaz Sharif Discuss Pakistan’s Politics and Efforts for Middle East Peace
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif met with PML-N leader Nawaz Sharif at Jati Umra in Lahore on Sunday, with Punjab Chief Minister Maryam Nawaz also present. The meeting focused on Pakistan's current polit...
